title: Aceras lanceum
taxonomy: Aceras lanceum is a species of orchid, and its classification is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, the family Orchidaceae, the genus Aceras, and the species A. lanceum. Within the Orchidaceae family, it is more specifically classified as being part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its orchid-like flowers and grass-like leaves. The genus Aceras is a small group of plants, with A. lanceum being the only species in the genus. The species is further divided into several subspecies based on its geographical distribution and genetic variations.

side_effects: Aceras lanceum is a plant species that has been reported to have potential side effects due to its toxicity.
